author: 2ZD1
content: Landed via cherry-pick onto main as 868e65c. Took the v1 crate removal, default.nix mainProgram fix, README/CHANGELOG cleanup, and script/ deletion as-is; SKILL.md hunks dropped (resolved with -X ours) in favor of #42's better rewrite. cargo test --workspace and cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings both pass.
